pr.title: feat: add agent execution loop and codex cli executor
pr.body:
## Summary
- Add `pl agent run` as the agent execution control-plane loop with gate verification, repair context, retry, and trace events.
- Harden repair policy through project config and failure-kind classification.
- Add agent trace metadata for provider/model/prompt/artifacts/tool calls/tokens.
- Add `codex-cli` executor support plus a fake Codex demo and new project adoption guide.

## Test Plan
- `git status --short --branch`
- `bash tests/cli/test-pl-agent.sh` -> pass: 6, fail: 0
- `bash examples/demo-agent-codex-cli/run-demo.sh` -> `Codex CLI Demo OK`
- `./bin/pl status --self-check` -> `OK: lightweight validator passed (4 changes)`
- `git diff --check` -> no output

## Notes
- This PR does not merge directly into `main`; it keeps review and merge explicit.
- The Codex demo uses a fake `codex` binary, so CI and local smoke tests do not require Codex login state.

<!-- CURSOR_SUMMARY -->
---

> [!NOTE]
> **Medium Risk**
> Adds a new command runner that executes arbitrary shell commands and introduces new retry/repair logic and trace emission paths, which could impact CI behavior and local workflows if edge cases mis-handle exit codes or config parsing. Changes are largely additive and covered by new CLI tests and runnable demos, reducing regression risk.
> 
> **Overview**
> Introduces **`pl agent run`** as a new CLI namespace and `scripts/pl-agent-run.sh` runner that executes an executor command, optionally runs `pl run --gate <X>` for verification, and on failure generates a Markdown *repair context* and retries repairs within a configured budget while emitting new `agent.*` trace events.
> 
> Extends the loop with **config-driven repair policy** (`agent.repair.max_retries` and `agent.repair.strategy.<failure_kind>`), basic failure-kind classification, and optional **agent trace metadata** flags (`--provider/--model/--prompt-path/--*-artifact/--tool-call/--tokens-*`) merged into emitted events and `--json` output.
> 
> Adds a **`codex-cli` executor** that builds a `codex exec ... - < prompt` invocation (with sandbox/approval/bin/extra args), plus new demos (`demo-agent-loop`, `demo-agent-crud-service`, `demo-agent-codex-cli` w/ fake codex), a new adoption guide and agent loop docs, CI wiring to run `tests/cli/test-pl-agent.sh`, and minor hygiene updates (ignore Python/tmp demo artifacts; `pl-status.sh` mktemp suffix tweak).
> 
> <sup>Reviewed by [Cursor Bugbot](https://cursor.com/bugbot) for commit 17105074ca072345909f716c0d48066d465ad096. Bugbot is set up for automated code reviews on this repo. Configure [here](https://www.cursor.com/dashboard/bugbot).</sup>
<!-- /CURSOR_SUMMARY -->
pr.author: walkertop
